description_long: This object is a carved stone fragment featuring a detailed human face in high relief, framed by what appears to be stylized hair or a headdress. The face is set against a roughly circular, flat background, with the sides and back of the stone showing irregular, weathered surfaces and some visible cracks. The back of the stone has a label or marking, suggesting it may have been cataloged or displayed in a collection. The stone's surface is predominantly a light tan to brown color, with darker patches and areas of discoloration, likely from age and exposure. The facial features are classical in style, with a calm expression and symmetrical proportions, indicating it may have originated from an architectural or monumental context. The overall form is blocky and substantial, with no visible openings or recesses beyond the carved relief.
description: A weathered, tan stone fragment with a detailed carved human face in high relief, set against a rough, circular background. The surface shows cracks, discoloration, and catalog markings on the back.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the depth of the facial relief and the irregular, layered texture of the stone's side.
description_view_1: The rear view shows a mostly flat, rough surface with a circular label or marking and visible cracks.
description_view_2: The right side view reveals the profile of the face and the pronounced, uneven stone texture along the edge.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full carved face, framed by stylized hair or a headdress, with the circular background clearly visible.
attribute_location: historic building facade or public park with classical sculptures
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or mounted on a plinth for display
attribute_pattern: features detailed artificial carvings in the form of a human face and stylized hair, with irregular natural stone texture on the sides and back
attribute_weathering: cracked and eroded with visible discoloration, indicating significant age and exposure to the elements
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: contrasts sharply with modern urban elements but may blend with other historic or stone features in parks or plazas
